mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user (user_id, phone, nick, gender, age, password_hash, bottom_line) VALUES (#{userId}, #{phone}, #{nick}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{passwordHash}, #{bottomLine})
mapper.select: SELECT u.* FROM app_user u INNER JOIN user_distill d ON d.user_id = u.user_id AND d.distill_status = 1 INNER JOIN user_agent a ON a.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.user_id != #{selfUserId} AND (#{selfGender} IS NULL OR u.gender IS NULL OR u.gender != #{selfGender}) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM match_record mr WHERE (mr.user_a = u.user_id OR mr.user_b = u.user_id) AND mr.status IN (0, 1, 2, 3) ) ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM match_record WHERE user_a = #{userId} OR user_b = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM match_record WHERE (user_a = #{userId} OR user_b = #{userId}) AND unlock_flag = 1
